positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric arrangement featuring interlocking celestial bodies and constellations, composed in a deep indigo and luminous gold palette. The design should resemble a negative-space engraving, with sharp, clean lines creating a sense of cosmic mystery and harmony. Include stylized representations of zodiac symbols (like a crescent moon, radiating stars, and planetary orbits) integrated into a cohesive, symmetrical pattern. The overall feel must be modern, upscale, and abstract, suitable for center-chest placement on apparel. High contrast, vector art aesthetic, crisp linework, symmetrical composition, dramatic rim lighting, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, fuzzy, noise, ugly, extra limbs, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, grayscale, messy, cluttered
